test.command: No test command is defined in .factory/services.yaml or package.json

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a rule that feature definitions must keep description, expectedBehavior, and verificationSteps aligned, especially for verification-only/deferred tasks.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: foundation-db-cleanup description says verification-only with deferred DDL, but expectedBehavior/verificationSteps still require DDL checks and typecheck/build gating.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update fullstack-worker procedure to support verification-only features and milestone-phased validator expectations (for example, allow skipping build/typecheck when explicitly deferred by feature contract).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both foundation-dead-code-cleanup and foundation-db-cleanup reviews observed mismatch between feature contracts and mandatory fullstack-worker validator steps.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit commit-scope hygiene guidance: keep feature commits narrowly scoped and avoid unrelated file additions in implementation commits.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: foundation-dead-code-cleanup review noted unrelated issue-template and ~/.cursor path changes alongside feature work in commit 825122b.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Resolve convention/enforcement drift by either enforcing 'no any' in lint config or relaxing mission convention text to match actual lint policy.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Mission AGENTS says no any, while .eslintrc sets @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any to warning; flagged by foundation-type-fixes review.

rejectedObservations.observation: Capture stale DEV_MODE deployment-doc guidance as shared state knowledge
rejectedObservations.reason: Rejected for shared-state update; this is a concrete code/documentation cleanup item best tracked as a feature-level non-blocking issue, not as durable shared execution guidance.

rejectedObservations.observation: Separate reports about fullstack-worker validator mismatch
